subject: (no subject)
body:
Landed the chopper on the boat..not actually as scary as I imagined ! Went down for 24 hours just to do that. Leaving now for SD and then back to NY Monday..I'll call you Sunday to talk about best plan for PB - I am going back to SD 21 to do Zero G flight and then going to Ranch 21 -23..back to SD 23rd - going to ranch 'cos Brice and Karen need some hand holding - 23 - 25 SD 25 th night to St Barts ..




Thx

G
